user.title: Connect to Marinara Engine
user.description: Enter the host and port where Marinara Engine is running (default: localhost:7860).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Marinara Engine. Check the host, port, and that the server is running.

abort.already_configured: Marinara Engine at this address is already configured.

init.title: Marinara Engine Options
init.description: Choose the primary chat and which tool categories Marinara is allowed to use.

data_description.enabled_categories: Only the selected categories will be synced as tools into Marinara Engine. Changes take effect after pressing the Sync HA Tools button or restarting Home Assistant.
